prompt: Tap flop middle slot before SPR pressure decision.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before depth action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_mid is the board anchor because the original board texture sets how much deep-stack pressure the spot can really support.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Use the flop anchor first because the original board texture sets how much deep-stack pressure the spot can really support.
